name.ja: <ruby>封<rt>ふう</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt>じん</rt></ruby>の<ruby>剣鬼<rt>アシュトラ</rt></ruby> ミクマリ
name.zh-CN: 封神之剑艮鬼 水子守

text.en: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by revealing 1 face-down card you control and returning it to the hand/Extra Deck. You can only Special Summon "Mikumari the Sealing Deity Ashtra" once per turn this way. You can only use each of the following effects of "Mikumari the Sealing Deity Ashtra" once per turn. During your Main Phase: You can add 1 non-Wyrm "Ashtra" monster from your Deck to your hand. If this card is sent to the GY as Synchro Material for an "Ashtra" monster: You can target 1 Normal Trap in your GY; Set it.
text.zh-CN: 此卡名以①方法的特殊召唤1回合仅可进行1次，且②③效果1回合仅可各使用1次。①：此卡可通过将自己场上的1张里侧表示卡出示给对手并放回手牌・额外牌组，来从手牌特殊召唤。②：在自己的主要阶段可以发动。从牌组将1只幻龙族以外的“艮鬼”怪兽加入手牌。③：此卡作为“艮鬼”同步怪兽的同步素材被送至墓地的情况下，以自己墓地的1张通常陷阱卡为对象可以发动。将该卡放置在自己场上。
